function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read local finance AGENTS.MD, and used exact record values.
function.outcome_justification: Across all matches for the service line 'buyer-language refinement memo', only the invoice issued_on 2026-03-26 falls since the start of March 2026; its line_eur is 180. The 2025-12-02 and 2025-12-30 matches are before the requested period.
